---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a focused improvement that fits the project's scope
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Use case

What are you trying to do?

## Why the current behavior is not enough

What blocks you today?

## Proposed change

Describe the smallest useful version of the idea.

## Scope check

- [ ] This does not require turning `simplykb` into a hosted platform
- [ ] This does not require queues, dashboards, or workflow engines
- [ ] This keeps the SDK's public surface small

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you consider?

## Additional context

Anything else that would help evaluate the request.
